name: on any_value_change
title: on any_value_change
description: This handler is called whenever a value of the given set changes. The sets are defined by the DO interface members (e.g. SomeInterface.SomeData, SomeInterface.SomeData.SubscriptionState). Each value at a derived object is part of such a set.
availability: CANoe Measurement Setup / CANalyzer Analysis Branch
CANoe Test Setup for Test Modules
CANoe Test Setup for Test Units

row: object Parent object of the changed value.
